name: search-and-extract
description: Agent performs a Google search and verifies the result.

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: `expected ok=true, got ${JSON.stringify(response)}`}, {ok: response.url && response.url.includes('google.com/search'), message: `expected Google search URL, got ${response.url}`}, {ok: response.query === 'BLDC driver IC', message: 'query should be echoed back'} ]
steps.note: Search action loads correct engine URL

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'expected ok=true'}, {ok: response.url.includes('example.com/article'), message: 'should navigate to target URL'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'getVisibleText should succeed'}, {ok: typeof response.text === 'string', message: 'should return string text'} ]
